mapper.select:
SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.created_at,
p.name AS product_name, p.price, p.sale_price, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.image_s, p.status,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price ELSE p.price END AS item_price,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price THEN p.sale_price * c.quantity ELSE p.price * c.quantity END AS item_total
FROM cart_items c JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{value} ORDER BY c.cart_id DESC
